allow: Bash(mysql -u root carelink -N -e "SELECT user_id, email, status FROM users WHERE user_type='peso' LIMIT 5;")

Bash(php -r '$c=@mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); if\(!$c\){echo "NO DB: ".mysqli_connect_error\(\);exit;} $r=$c->query\("SELECT user_id,email,status FROM users WHERE user_type=\\"peso\\" LIMIT 5"\); while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\) echo $x["user_id"]." | ".$x["email"]." | ".$x["status"]."\\n";')

Bash(php -r '$c=mysqli_connect\("127.0.0.1","root","","carelink",3306\); foreach\(["job_posts","placements","complaints"] as $t\){ $r=$c->query\("SHOW COLUMNS FROM $t LIKE \\"%_at\\""\); $cols=[]; while\($x=$r->fetch_assoc\(\)\)$cols[]=$x["Field"]; echo "$t: ".implode\(", ",$cols\)."\\n"; }')
